title: Application Studies
description: Four independent studies applying the theme to distinct display surfaces, each testing readability, hierarchy, and artifact credibility without shared references.
creative_direction: Each image is independent: one theme, four finished surfaces, and no shared reference dependency. The package broadens the theme beyond one canonical board by testing display, documentation, and symbolic storytelling in separate contexts.

en.title: Application Studies
en.description: Four independent studies applying the theme to distinct display surfaces, each testing readability, hierarchy, and artifact credibility without shared references.

zh-CN.title: 应用研究
zh-CN.description: 四张互不依赖的应用研究图，把主题放到不同展示表面中，分别测试可读性、层级和器物可信度。
